canonical_title: Google delays Gemini 3.5 Pro launch as investor scrutiny rises
treatment: Treat the confirmed delay from the previously expected June launch as covered. Reinclude only for an official release date, launch, further delay, pricing/API details, model card, or material independent evaluation.
known_facts: Reuters reported on 2026-07-21 at 13:45 UTC that Google delayed Gemini 3.5 Pro from a previously expected June launch.
The model is positioned as important for AI coding tools and agentic tasks.
The delay is increasing investor scrutiny of Alphabet's large AI infrastructure spending while Chinese open-weight models gain attention.
Google had not published a new official launch date in the reporting available at this run.
reinclude_only_if: Google or Google DeepMind publishes an official launch date or releases Gemini 3.5 Pro.
Official API pricing, availability, benchmark, or model-card details are published.
A further material delay, cancellation, or product-scope change is credibly reported.
notes: Selected as a new availability and product-timing hard delta within the night window. This does not establish model quality or a revised launch date.
